title: Produce the M3 ordinary life simulation plan
summary: Create the reviewed M3 plan and proposed task DAG for the ordinary life simulation milestone before any M3 implementation starts.
acceptance: Plan contains an acyclic M3 task DAG starting with scenario and architecture gates before implementation

Every M3 task packet lists objective allowed paths forbidden paths dependencies owner reviewer acceptance required checks benchmark impact review routing rollback model owner gate and Spark eligibility
Plan preserves Worker/headless authority sim-core purity fixed tick seeded RNG bounded indexed thinking serializable jobs structured reasons save/replay Worker parity and independent review
Scope stays inside M3 ordinary life simulation and excludes M4 lamp Chronicle anomaly crisis chains public save compatibility broad content production and platform save UI
No runtime implementation branch is started by WM-0045
Owner gates and independent reviewer verification pass

history.details: WM-0044 is done; reviewed M3 entry prompt requires a dedicated M3 planning task before any implementation.

Produced reviewed M3 ordinary-life simulation planning package: roadmap plan, WM-0046 through WM-0060 proposed task DAG and packets, WM-0045 reports, and narrow project-state planning marker; no runtime implementation started; required checks pass.

changes_requested: High: M3 DAG stops at WM-0060 closeout and blocks M4, but does not define an explicit future M4-entry prompt/handoff gate; add a reviewed non-implementation M4 entry-prompt gate or equivalent closeout acceptance before verification.

Repaired WM-0045 review finding: WM-0060 now requires a non-executable future M4 entry prompt handoff artifact while forbidding M4 task creation, promotion, claim or implementation; updated plan and reports; required checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings; WM-0060 now requires a non-executable future M4 entry prompt handoff artifact while forbidding M4 task creation, promotion, claim or implementation; downstream tasks remain proposed; scope and required checks pass.
WM-0045 M3 planning package verified after reviewer-requested M4 entry-prompt gate repair; no runtime implementation started; integration checks pass.

objective: Produce the reviewed M3 ordinary-life simulation plan, including an acyclic proposed task DAG and task packets, before any M3 runtime implementation starts.
forbiddenPaths: M4 lamp, Chronicle, anomaly, crisis-chain or director implementation
benchmarkImpact: None directly. WM-0045 may define required M3 benchmark and invariant tasks, but it must not update runtime benchmarks or baselines.
reviewRouting: Systems-architect completes to reviewer. Project-director integrates only after independent verification that all downstream M3 implementation tasks remain proposed and blocked behind scenario and architecture gates.
rollbackModel: Revert the M3 planning document, proposed M3 task packets, WM-0045 report and narrow project-state planning marker; leave M2 closeout intact and M3 implementation unstarted.
ownerGate: Do not edit product runtime, tests, benchmarks or package manifests in WM-0045
Keep all downstream M3 tasks proposed until their dependencies are done
Define explicit block conditions for owner-store gaps, global scans, public protocol/save/schema changes, new dependencies and M4 scope creep
Preserve independent reviewer separation and do not mark any downstream task done

sparkEligibility.reason: M3 milestone planning, task DAG design, ownership boundaries and review routing are architecture/control-plane work and cannot be assigned to Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings; WM-0060 now requires a non-executable future M4 entry prompt handoff artifact while forbidding M4 task creation, promotion, claim or implementation; downstream tasks remain proposed; scope and required checks pass.

integration.summary: WM-0045 M3 planning package verified after reviewer-requested M4 entry-prompt gate repair; no runtime implementation started; integration checks pass.
